label: frightening_imagery_haunted_mansion_1_approach
qwen: atmospheric photograph of a lone figure in a long grey coat standing at the foot of a stone path leading up to an enormous Gothic mansion silhouetted against a full moon, gnarled leafless trees framing the path, fog drifting low across the overgrown lawn, mansion windows dark except one upper window glowing faintly amber
video: the figure begins walking slowly up the path toward the looming mansion, fog swirling around their footsteps, audio is a low ambient drone, distant raven caws, footsteps crunching on gravel, the wind through dead trees, a single discordant violin note holding sustain

label: frightening_imagery_haunted_mansion_2_door_creak
video: the figure stands before the enormous arched wooden front door of the mansion and reaches out to push it open, the heavy door swings inward on its own with a long groan revealing a pitch-dark foyer beyond, audio is the door creaking on rusted hinges, a sudden cold gust whistling past, faint distant whispering from inside, the violin note shifting to a minor key

label: frightening_imagery_haunted_mansion_3_portrait_hallway
video: the figure walks slowly down a long dimly-lit Victorian hallway lined with tall portraits of stern ancestors, a single ornate candelabra flickering as they pass, faded burgundy wallpaper, threadbare carpet runner, distant doorway revealing only black shadow, audio is creaking floorboards beneath each step, candle flames sputtering, that distant whispered phrase becoming faintly intelligible: turn back, turn back

label: frightening_imagery_haunted_mansion_4_music_box_room
video: the figure pushes open a side door to find a small parlor crammed wall to wall with hundreds of antique music boxes of every size, each one playing a different slow tinkling melody simultaneously, creating a dissonant overlapping cacophony, the figure freezes in the doorway, audio is the layered music box melodies overlapping into eerie polyphony, no other sound

label: frightening_imagery_haunted_mansion_5_mirror_reveal
video: the figure approaches a tall ornate floor mirror at the end of the music box room and looks into it, the camera pushes in slowly on the reflection which shows a different person staring back wearing identical clothes but with a knowing unsettling smile, the figure does not match the reflection's smile, audio is all the music boxes simultaneously hitting their final notes and stopping, then absolute silence broken only by the reflection's whispered single word: hello, then a single sharp orchestral sting
